Section Title: ... > What is in DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF (Ex- DSP World Gold Fund of Fund)?
Content:
DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF invests primarily in the leading international gold mining companies.
It does this by investing in various active & passive international funds/ ETFs in gold mining space.
This fund is not an index fund or an ETF and does not hold physical gold in its portfolio.

Let's take an example, a mutual fund was priced (NAV) at Rs 100 one year back and fund gave 20% returns in last 1 year. Now for the growth option, today's mutual fund price (NAV) will be 120, so all profit/loss reflects in price of the fund. Whereas for the dividend option some amount out of Rs 20 profit may be given back to investor in form of dividend and today's NAV will be lower than 120.

Section Title: DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan > ... > Min. No of Cheques
Content:
12
More Details
About DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan
DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan is a equity mutual fund scheme of DSP Mutual Fund. Launched on January 02, 2013, it is currently managed by Kaivalya Nadkarni. The fund has an expense ratio of 1.74% with an overall AUM (Assets Under Management) of ₹2,191 Cr.
DSP World Gold FoF - Direct Plan invests mainly in the shares of foreign companies listed outside India. Being a fund of funds, it invests its assets in a set of mutual fund schemes instead of the underlying securities directly. The fund allows minimum lumpsum investment of ₹100 and minimum SIP of ₹100.
Investment Strategy
Section Title: DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan > ... > Min. No of Cheques
Content:
The Scheme seeks capital appreciation by investing in units/securities issued by overseas Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) and/or overseas funds and/or units issued by domestic mutual funds that provide exposure to Gold/Gold Mining theme. The Scheme may also invest a certain portion of its corpus in money market securities and/or money market/liquid schemes of DSP Mutual Fund, in order to meet
Suitability
International funds are suitable for investors:
Seeking exposure in shares of foreign companies for diversification
Aiming for long-term wealth creation
With a 5+ year investment horizon
Who are at ease with the market's ups and downs
Note:
Invest only through SIP
Being a FoF, the fund invests in a set of mutual fund schemes instead of the underlying securities directly
Capital Gains Taxation

Fund objective
An open ended Fund of Funds scheme seeking to generate capital appreciation by investing predominantly in units of BlackRock Global Funds - World Gold Fund (BGF-WGF). The Scheme may, at the discretion of the Investment Manager, also invest in the units of other similar overseas mutual fund schemes, which may constitute a significant part of its corpus.

Section Title: DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Growth Direct Plan > FAQs
Content:
What is the category of the DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Growth Direct Plan?
The category of the DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Growth Direct Plan is Fund of Funds.
Who is the fund manager of DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Growth Direct Plan?
DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Growth Direct Plan is managed by Jay Kothari as on 27/03/2026.
What is the exit load for DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Growth Direct Plan?
Exit load is the fee/penalty which some of the mutual funds charge in case an investor decides to sell his/her mutual fund units within the exit load window. Exit load for DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Growth Direct Plan is
No exit load.
